description: An inappropriate and non-constructive post has been flagged in the public community forum.

nodes.task_description: Review the flagged post and determine that it violates the community guidelines.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms the post is inappropriate.

nodes.task_description: Remove the post from the forum.
Send a private warning to the user who made the post, explaining the violation.

expected_outcome.value: Agent communicates the policy violation to the user.
